rationale: Both evaluations land on the same 4/10 score and make substantively identical points: minimal recent C++ experience, no industrial automation/IEC 62443/message-broker exposure, and a JS/TypeScript/DLang-dominated stack. The wording differs (naming National Instruments vs. citing the 2014-2015 role, listing Modbus/Azure vs. OPC UA), but these are ordinary run-to-run rephrasings of the same skill-based reasoning. Nothing in the variant references location, nationality, or anything keyed to the Berlin→Brazil change.
